text:
Kenny Beecham and the “Numbers on the Board” crew create their perfect roster for Team USA Basketball at the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games.

LeBron James and Steph Curry discuss the possibility of competing in the 2028 Olympics on the “Mind the Game” podcast.

Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James and Golden State Warriors star Steph Curry discussed if they plan to play in the 2028 Summer Olympics.

About the Los Angeles Olympics When are the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics? The Olympics will return to Los Angeles for an historic third time in 2028. The LA 2028 Olympics Opening Ceremony is July 14, 2028 with competition through July 30, 2028. The LA28 Paralympic Games will kick off Aug. 15, 2028 and close Aug. 27, 2028.  The organizing committee has released…

LA28, the organizing committee for the 2028 Olympic and Paralympic Games, launched a volunteer program for interested residents to help prepare the region ahead of the international event.

Al Roker sits down with Chase Cain for a wide-ranging conversation on Predictable. The two discussed everything from the impact of climate change on the Olympics to the extreme weather events which lead to the creation of the NBC News Climate Unit.

Paralympic swimming medalist Ali Truwit is running the TCS New York City Marathon just two years after surviving a shark attack.

Just two years after losing a foot in a shark attack, Paralympic swimming medalist Ali Truwit is preparing to run the TCS New York City Marathon.

President Donald Trump reaffirmed plans to move World Cup games from Boston and the 2028 Olympic Games from Los Angeles if he deems the cities too unsafe to host. “If we think there’s any reason that … they’re not doing their job, we’re going to take those World Cup games and move them someplace else.”

USA Basketball has announced Erik Spoelstra as the new coach for the men’s team for the 2027 World Cup in Qatar and the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles.

President Donald Trump said he would consider moving the 2026 World Cup and 2028 Olympic Games from Boston and Los Angeles over safety concerns, offering National Guard assistance in the Democrat-run cities. “Boston better clean up their act, that’s all I can say.”

The Miami Heat head coach, who served as an assistant at the 2024 Olympics, reportedly will coach Team USA for the next World Cup and Olympics.

The NFL plans to launch women’s and men’s professional flag football leagues “in the next couple of years,” Commissioner Roger Goodell said Thursday.

Mayor Karen Bass announced a plan on Monday, including a collaboration between LA28 and Highland Electric Fleets, to advance the city’s sustainability and public transportation goals for the 2028 Olympic and Paralympic Games.

President Donald Trump said that he would consider moving the World Cup and Olympics from any cities deemed unsafe. “If any city we think is going to be even a little bit dangerous for the World Cup, or for the Olympics … we won’t allow it.”

Kara Lawson, who coaches at Duke, was an assistant coach for Team USA at the 2024 Paris Olympics and previously won a gold medal as a player.

Olympics fans, on your marks. Registration for tickets to see athletes compete in the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics will begin in January, the LA28 organizing committee announced Wednesday. Tickets for both the Olympics and Paralympic Games will start at $28 with early access for people who live around venue cities, the committee said. Details about the exact date when the…

Starbucks will be the official coffee partner of the LA28 Olympic and Paralympic Games and Team USA, it was announced Tuesday.

Basketball at the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics will start two days before the opening ceremony for those Games, organizers confirmed Wednesday.

LA28 organizers will sell naming rights for some of its venues. Here’s a look at which ones could be up for grabs.
